skills.name: Divine Blessing Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Divine Blessing skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Divine Blessing skill.

skills.name: True Critical Status
skills.description: Greatly increases status effect damage (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Greatly increases status effect damage (paralysis, poison, sleep, blast) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Poison Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of poison buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Poison buildup +5% Bonus: +10
Poison buildup +10% Bonus: +10
Poison buildup +20% Bonus: +10
Poison buildup +30% Bonus: +10

skills.name: Divine Blessing
skills.description: Has a predetermined chance of reducing the damage you take.

levels.description: While active, reduces damage taken by 15%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 30%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 50%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%.
While active, reduces damage taken by 60%. Skill becomes easier to activate as well.

skills.name: Resentment
skills.description: Increases attack when you have recoverable damage (the red portion of your health gauge).

levels.description: While active, grants attack +5.
While active, grants attack +10.
While active, grants attack +15.
While active, grants attack +20.
While active, grants attack +25.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Spread/Power Shots
skills.description: Increases the attack power of spread ammo, power shot arrows, and Thousand Dragons.

levels.description: Increases the power of spread ammo, power shot arrows, and Thousand Dragons.
